QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_70

question.text: Under which tax section does NPS Vatsalya contribution qualify for deduction?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** NPS Vatsalya contributions qualify for deduction under Section 80CCD(1B), which provides an additional Rs.50,000 deduction over the 80C limit. **The Trap:** 80CCD(1) is for the subscriber's own NPS contribution. Vatsalya contributions by parents/guardians fall under 80CCD(1B). **Cross-Exam Context:** This means parents can claim up to Rs.50,000 deduction for Vatsalya contributions under 80CCD(1B), in addition to their own NPS 80CCD(1) deduction. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** For parents already maximizing 80CCD(1), Vatsalya provides an additional tax-saving avenue under 80CCD(1B).
